ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/21/2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self Represented Plaintiff Kathryn Tobie is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to NOV-01-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
